examples: My starving soul nearly screamed with each voluptuous bite of silky roasted vegetables and chewy crust.
The textile is a lovely, silky fiber made from waste material left after soybeans are used to make Tofu.
He spoke in a silky tone.
Sheex feel ridiculously silky and are made of 82% Microfiber Polyester, 18% Lycra Spandex.
Strong's impressive, silky-smooth performance makes this idealized figure more credible than he might have been.
